scriptText:
I. GOLDEN SEAL

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic dark-fantasy scene: @EVAN as EVAN, a card caster, performs a theatrical card incantation on a rain-slicked overpass. Live action, minimal VFX, ritualistic and grounded.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Ensure EVAN's right hand holds the wand continuously from the first frame. Maintain the magic circle anchored to his standing position; it must not drift. Preserve screen direction: EVAN faces camera-right, card thrown camera-right, circle centered beneath him. The color-inversion wave must originate from the card's burst point and spread radially outward through the environment — city lights, reflections, and shadows should flip to photographic negative tones (cyan/magenta luminous shadows, darkened highlights) while EVAN and the immediate foreground retain near-normal color. Avoid VFX excess — every effect must have a visible physical cause. Track the card's position and glow state across every shot. Prioritize EVAN's physical commitment and breath over spectacle.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Dark fantasy, live-action — gritty, grounded, ritualistic
Nighttime elevated overpass, rain-slicked concrete, sprawling city skyline behind
Palette: deep blacks, cool blue-grey shadows, warm gold magic, inversion = cyan/magenta photographic negative
Wardrobe: long structured overcoat — high stiff collar framing jaw, sharp defined shoulders, hem flaring dramatically past knees in wind. Dark fitted shirt beneath. Tailored dark trousers. Pointed leather boots. Silver chain clasp at throat suggesting ceremonial purpose.
Props: ornate wand (right hand, compact, carved detail), single oversized card (tarot-sized, ornate face)
Magic circle: concentric golden rings with runic glyphs on wet ground, reflections visible in puddles
Lighting: overhead city spill provides cool blue key, magic circle provides warm gold under-light on face, rain droplets catch light during magic moments
VFX mood: restrained — glowing rune, golden energy beam, radial shockwave, color-inversion wave spreading outward
Audio atmosphere: rain and distant city → resonant rising hum → near-silence → bass boom + rushing wind → decay to eerie inverted silence
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
MS, slightly low angle, camera-right of axis — EVAN stands on a rain-slicked elevated overpass, city skyline sprawling behind him in soft bokeh. Dark structured overcoat, high collar, long dramatic hem. Right hand grips the wand at his side, pointed down. Left hand at his inner jacket pocket. Expression: calm jaw, steady eyes. Cool blue-grey light from distant city spills across wet concrete. No magic visible yet.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, slightly low angle, camera-right of axis, LOCKOFF -> [ACT] EVAN stands motionless on the overpass, wand in right hand at his side, left hand at inner jacket pocket, overcoat hem settling from a gust, city lights behind him in soft bokeh -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] soft rain on concrete, distant city hum, cool blue-grey ambient light
[CAM] CU, camera-right of axis, shallow DOF on left hand -> [ACT] Left hand reaches into inner jacket pocket, fingers pinch and slowly draw a single oversized card — clears the pocket held between thumb and forefinger, raised to chest height, right hand and wand stay still at his side, rain droplets visible on jacket sleeve -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] fabric rustle of overcoat, card surface catches faint city light
[CAM] MS, camera-right of axis, profile framing -> [ACT] EVAN flicks his left wrist forward — the card spins once in the air traveling camera-right, left hand drops to his side, right hand still holds wand down, eyes track the card's trajectory -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] thin whistle of card cutting rain-filled air
[CAM] WS, camera-right of axis, full body and skyline -> [ACT] The card decelerates and hangs at chest height hovering, rotates slowly, faint shimmer around its surface; simultaneously a golden magic circle traces itself into existence on the wet concrete beneath EVAN's boots — concentric rings of glowing runes spreading outward from his position, golden under-light now illuminates his face from below, rain droplets catch the gold light, particles drift upward from the circle toward the card -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] low resonant hum building, runes glow warm gold reflecting in puddles
[CAM] ECU, card surface fills frame, center composition, extreme shallow DOF -> [ACT] The symbol on the card's surface ignites — golden light traces the symbol's lines from center outward in sharp detail, city lights blur into cyan bokeh behind, magic circle glow reflects on card edges -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] humming intensifies, narrows to single resonant tone, rain droplets suspended mid-air near the card
[CAM] MCU, camera-right of axis, chest and face -> [ACT] EVAN raises the wand in his right hand forward — pointed directly at the floating card, wand tip glows gold, a thin golden energy beam connects wand tip to the card's ignited symbol, magic circle spins faster beneath him, rain droplets suspended in air around the wand's light, expression tightens — jaw clenches, eyes sharpen, lips part slightly -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] ambient sound drops to near-silence, only focused hum remains
[CAM] MCU, camera-right of axis, chest and face, handheld slight shake -> [ACT] EVAN commands "RELEASE" — the card erupts with golden light, magic circle detonates outward as radial shockwave, EVAN's coat and hair whip violently backward from the blast, debris scatters radially, his body braces — planted feet leaning slightly into the force, expression: wide eyes, mouth finishing the word, absolute conviction -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] deep bass BOOM, rushing wind, the shockwave carries a visible wave of color inversion in its wake — city lights beyond the overpass flip to photographic negative, cyan shadows, magenta lights, wet concrete reflects unnatural inverted hues, wave spreads outward across the entire visible environment
[CAM] WS, frontal angle slightly off-axis, full environment visible -> [ACT] Energy dissipates — magic circle's last traces sink into wet concrete, dust and particles settle slowly, the captured card dims and descends toward EVAN's hand, the entire environment now holds in inverted color state — cyan luminous shadows, magenta-shifted city lights, eerie stillness, EVAN exhales and lowers the wand, overcoat settles, expression softens into quiet satisfaction as he surveys the transformed world around him -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] boom decays to low rumble then silence, eerie ambient inverted silence, no natural city sound — only stillness
[</BRIEF>]

II. BLUE ARCANE

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic live-action grounded urban fantasy scene where @EVAN as EVAN, a rogue card hunter, performs a dramatic wind-card capture ritual on a rain-slicked rooftop at night — blending theatrical physicality with restrained, gesture-driven VFX.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Maintain EVAN's right-hand wand grip from opening through capture — wand never changes hands. Keep the card spatially anchored in front of his torso within arm's reach, never teleporting behind or above him. Preserve rooftop geography: city skyline stays behind him, railing EVANs edge, AC unit stays stage-left. All VFX must originate from EVAN's physical gestures — light erupts from wand movement, energy follows arm trajectory, card reacts to voice and wand direction. Escalate environmental response (wind, puddle ripple, light flicker) proportional to magical intensity, then resolve to absolute stillness after capture. Keep camera on EVAN's front side of the 180-degree axis throughout.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Palette: deep navy shadows, charcoal wardrobe, warm amber city bokeh, cool white-blue wand/card energy
Lighting: warm amber rim from city behind, wand as practical key during cast, overcast top fill
Wardrobe: dark fitted leather jacket, black turtleneck, dark slim trousers, black boots
Styling: short tousled hair, light stubble, natural texture
Props: sleek dark metal wand (minimal, not ornate), translucent card with faint blue-white glow
Location: wet concrete rooftop, metal railing, puddles reflecting lights, city bokeh, AC unit stage-left
Sound: escalating wind, electrical hum, distant city, dead silence after capture
VFX: physically motivated only — wand light, energy ribbons, card glow → collapse → absorption
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
WS, LOW ANGLE, camera-right of axis, LOCKOFF — EVAN stands center-frame on the wet rooftop, city skyline glowing amber behind him through overcast haze, right hand gripping the dark metal wand at his side pointing downward, a translucent card hovering at chest height three feet in front of him pulsing faintly blue-white, puddles on concrete reflecting both city glow and card light, cold rim on his left shoulder, jacket collar lifting in building wind.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] WS, LOW ANGLE, LOCKOFF -> [BLOCK] EVAN holds center, card hovering front -> [ACT] He studies the card with focused stillness, right hand tight on wand, wind lifts jacket collar and tousles hair, card pulse quickens -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] wind escalates, card flashes brighter, puddles ripple outward
[CAM] PUSH IN to MS, smooth dolly -> [BLOCK] EVAN fills frame waist-up, card still front -> [ACT] He raises the wand forward in a sharp arc, right arm fully extended toward the card, lips part, card flares in response -> [VFX] wand tip ignites white-blue, faint energy wisps curl from tip, card glow intensifies
[CAM] MCU, HANDHELD, subtle drift -> [ACT] He shouts the release command, wrist snaps wand forward, white-blue energy ribbons spiral from wand to card, hair and jacket blast backward from shockwave, card vibrates violently in mid-air -> [VFX] energy ribbons bridge wand to card
[CAM] MS, TRACKING LEFT -> [BLOCK] EVAN staggers half-step stage-right, card holds front-left -> [ACT] Energy pushes back, he grits teeth and leans forward into the force, left foot slides on wet concrete, left arm extends for balance, he pushes through -> [ENV] puddles splash from ground vibration, wind peaks
[CAM] CU, RACK FOCUS wand tip to card -> [ACT] EVAN holds position, right hand steady -> [VFX] card fractures with light, collapses inward, shoots as concentrated beam into the wand tip, right hand recoils slightly from absorption -> [AUDIO] electrical surge peaks then cuts dead
[CAM] MCU, GENTLE TILT DOWN -> [BLOCK] EVAN back center, wand lowering to right side -> [ACT] Wind stops, he exhales, shoulders drop, lowers wand slowly, faint smile crosses his face as he glances down at the wand -> [ENV] city ambience returns soft, puddles go still, jacket settles flat
[</BRIEF>]
